summary: CHARACTER CREATION OCCUPATIONAL FIELDS List Occupational fields consist

mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 054 > history > CHARACTER CREATION OCCUPATIONAL FIELDS List Occupational fields consist
mechanics.excerpt: CHARACTER CREATION OCCUPATIONAL FIELDS List Occupational fields consist of several skills that are most commonly used when per forming particular job_ The following lists do not include every conceivable skill related t0 that field but rather the skills most strongly associated with field that are used most often in day t0 day operations When character receives field during the Life Path, he or she gets three Skill Points for every skill associated with that field.
